response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, fintech-specific domain knowledge, and a proven track record in scaling engineering teams or architecting production-grade multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments.
strengths: Diverse technical background with hands-on experience in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and AI-agent tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq).
Proven ability to design and maintain complex, scalable platforms (e.g., GISCollective as an open-source, event-driven geo-data system).
Strong problem-solving skills and community engagement, evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience; roles are primarily senior/staff engineering positions without evidence of CTO-level responsibilities.
Limited fintech domain expertise; experience is primarily in ad-tech, direct mail, and general software development.
Multi-agent AI experience appears peripheral (e.g., tooling contributions) rather than core to production systems with financial stakes.
